name: System Info
description: Shows CPU, RAM, and disk usage summary
author: AgentOS

steps.command: $cpu = Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor | Select-Object -First 1; $ram = Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem; $ramGB = [math]::Round($ram.TotalPhysicalMemory/1GB, 1); Write-Output "CPU: $($cpu.Name)"; Write-Output "Cores: $($cpu.NumberOfCores) / Threads: $($cpu.NumberOfLogicalProcessors)"; Write-Output "RAM: ${ramGB} GB"; Write-Output "OS: $((Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).Caption)"
